text: A healthy lifestyle is about more than just eating well. A balanced diet, with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, even a daily walk, strengthens your heart and muscles. Don't forget sleep—aim for seven to eight hours each night to let your body rest and repair. However, physical health is only part of the picture. Your mental health is equally important. Spending time with friends and hobbies can reduce stress. Finally, a healthy work-life balance is essential. Make time for relaxation and activities you enjoy. When you care for both your body and your mind, you feel happier and more energetic.
